creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
The current version of a port will fail on the patching stage if
parallel dimensions theme isn't selected from the OPTIONS.

Fix: 

http://codelabs.ru/fbsd/patches/ports/slim-themes-1.0.0_1-fix-pdims-patching.diff
How-To-Repeat: 
Invoke 'make config', unselect ALL, select some themes, but
parallel dimensions.
